title: Press to Meow
description: Tap and collect points from the meow
aboutgame: Press to Meow is a soft, cozy clicker game where every tap rewards you with a sweet little meow and a sprinkle of confetti. Collect meows, unlock cute kitten skins, and turn a stressful day into a purring one.
How to play: <.1..> Click or tap the big pink paw button on the screen.<><.2..> Each press plays a meow sound and adds +1 to your meow counter.<><.3..> Reach milestones (10, 100, 1000 meows) to unlock new kitten avatars.<><.4..> Your progress is saved automatically in your browser — come back anytime.
Tips: 🌸Turn your sound on for the full pookie experience.<>🌸Try pressing fast for combo confetti bursts.<>🌸Hidden surprise at 777 meows — can you find it?

title: OIIAOIIA CAT
description: Enjoy the interactive OiiaOiia Cat game! Click to play the spinning cat
aboutgame: Experience the legendary spinning cat! Interactive and fun.
How to play: <.1..> Click on the cat to start the spinning animation.<><.2..> Listen to the iconic OIIAOIIA sound.
